chat_history.text: Hello there! I'm your trading assistant. I can chat about market trends, trading strategy, and risk management. I also help you manage the settings for your live auto-trader. How can I help you today?
XAUUSD (Gold) is currently trading at 4047.1212. It's down 11.58 over the last 20 15-minute candles. The recent high was 4061.4085, and the low was 4040.2681.
whats the percentage today of gold movemnt has it been bullish or bearish?
Based on the last 20 15-minute candles, XAUUSD is down 11.96 from its recent high of 4061.4085, which is approximately a -0.29% movement. So, it has been bearish over this period.
